sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this Tier 3 game

special_mechanics.name: Phoenix Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Player can transform Jill into a flying phoenix bird with special flying movement

special_mechanics.name: Frog Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Player can transform Jill into a jumping frog with enhanced jumping mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Fish Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Player can transform Jill into a swimming fish with swimming mechanics

tier_notes: Tier 3 (Empirical/Qualitative): Wikipedia source provides only high-level gameplay descriptions without numerical physics parameters. No quantitative movement, gravity, or jump data documented. Game features transformation mechanics that alter player movement properties but specific physics values are not available in source material.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Jill of the Jungle article
